message:
feat(cx): add Macaroon-based capability token format (bd-2lqyk.1)

Implements bearer tokens with HMAC-chained caveats for decentralized
capability attenuation. Supports 6 predicate types (TimeBefore,
TimeAfter, RegionScope, TaskScope, MaxUses, Custom), versioned binary
serialization, and constant-time signature verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
